title: Section 27
content: 1[27. Confiscation of property if no claimant appears.--(1) If no person shall within the period allowed claim such property, or the proceeds thereof, if sold, it may, if not already sold under sub-section (2) of the last preceding section, be sold under the orders of the Magistrate of the district. (2) The sale-proceeds of property sold under the preceding sub-section and the proceeds of property sold under section 26 to which no claim has been established shall be 2 [ at the disposal of the 3 [State] Government.]]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 8 of 1895, s. 8, for section 27. 2. Subs. by the A.O. 1937, for "at the disposal of Govt." 3. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for "Provincial".
